calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Clifford Wang, Esq. for Petitioners: Zhen Xie and Annie Wu, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Wei Jun Xie.
Mr. Wang is also served as a Cantoneses Interpreter.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Derek Wei Jun Xie.
Decree signed in open court.
